description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:1.26-slim Docker image and defines a single build stage. Cache the .cargo/ and target/ directories and set the CARGO_HOME variable to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cargo. Add a mc-wrap job in the build stage that runs `cargo build --release`, then `strip target/release/mc-wrap`, and finally moves the binary with `mv target/release/mc-wrap ./`. Configure the job to publish the resulting `mc-wrap` file as an artifact named mc-wrap, with no additional services or trigger rules.
